name: PHASE-42 owner-facing test-report endpoint (REAL HTTP): a project that exists with NO prior run -> GET /api/ai-os/project/test-report fail-SOFT { ok:true, report:null, reason:NO_REPORT } (NOT a 500)
_phase42_note: Locks the fail-SOFT branch of the owner-evidence surface. In-process apiServer (isolated temp root + token, S332 pattern); the helper seeds an existing project dir (project_state.json) with NO forge_tests/last_report.json. read_report returns REPORT_NOT_FOUND -> the endpoint maps it to a soft null, not an error. Contract: docs/09_verify/20_BUILT_PROJECT_TEST_CONTRACT.md §5.3.
